requirement.description: Upon a change in overspeed warning status, the gateway shall immediately transmit the updated warning information to the instrument cluster.
requirement.python_test_setup:
import os
import time
import pytest
import can

MSG_ID_GW_WARNINGS = 0xD2
EXPECTED_MIN_MESSAGES = 3

@pytest.fixture(scope="module")
def can_bus():
    bus = can.interface.Bus(interface=os.getenv('CAN_INTERFACE', 'socketcan'), channel=os.getenv('CAN_CHANNEL', 'can0'), bitrate=500000)
    yield bus
    bus.shutdown()

def decode_overspeed_warning(data_bytes: bytes) -> int:
    # OverspeedWarning = bit 0 -> byte 0, bit 0
    return (data_bytes[0] >> 0) & 0x01

def collect_warning_messages(bus, duration_sec=2.0):
    msgs = []
    start = time.time()
    while time.time() - start < duration_sec:
        msg = bus.recv(timeout=0.2)
        if msg and msg.arbitration_id == MSG_ID_GW_WARNINGS:
            msgs.append(msg)
    return msgs

test_cases.title: Verify immediate transmission when overspeed changes 0 to 1
test_cases.precondition: Ignition ON; VehicleSpeed below threshold; Monitor CAN ID 0xD2
test_cases.expected_result: OverspeedWarning transitions from 0 to 1 and is transmitted immediately
test_cases.python_test_script:
def test_tc_gw_ovr_imm_001_immediate_set(can_bus):
    msgs = collect_warning_messages(can_bus, 3.0)
    assert len(msgs) >= EXPECTED_MIN_MESSAGES
    states = [decode_overspeed_warning(m.data) for m in msgs]
    assert 0 in states and 1 in states
    assert states[-1] == 1

test_cases.title: Verify immediate transmission when overspeed clears 1 to 0
test_cases.precondition: Ignition ON; Overspeed active; Monitor CAN ID 0xD2
test_cases.expected_result: OverspeedWarning transitions from 1 to 0 and is transmitted immediately
test_cases.python_test_script:
def test_tc_gw_ovr_imm_002_immediate_clear(can_bus):
    msgs = collect_warning_messages(can_bus, 3.0)
    assert len(msgs) >= EXPECTED_MIN_MESSAGES
    states = [decode_overspeed_warning(m.data) for m in msgs]
    assert states[-1] == 0

test_cases.title: Verify immediate transmission on rapid speed increase
test_cases.precondition: Ignition ON; VehicleSpeed well below threshold; Monitor CAN ID 0xD2
test_cases.python_test_script:
def test_tc_gw_ovr_imm_003_rapid_increase(can_bus):
    msgs = collect_warning_messages(can_bus, 2.0)
    assert len(msgs) >= EXPECTED_MIN_MESSAGES
    states = [decode_overspeed_warning(m.data) for m in msgs]
    assert states[-1] == 1

test_cases.title: Verify immediate transmission on rapid speed decrease
test_cases.precondition: Ignition ON; VehicleSpeed above threshold; Monitor CAN ID 0xD2
test_cases.python_test_script:
def test_tc_gw_ovr_imm_004_rapid_decrease(can_bus):
    msgs = collect_warning_messages(can_bus, 2.0)
    assert len(msgs) >= EXPECTED_MIN_MESSAGES
    states = [decode_overspeed_warning(m.data) for m in msgs]
    assert states[-1] == 0

test_cases.title: Verify immediate update during fluctuating speed around threshold
test_cases.precondition: Ignition ON; Speed fluctuates around threshold; Monitor CAN ID 0xD2
steps: Alternate speed slightly below and above threshold
test_cases.expected_result: OverspeedWarning updates immediately according to latest speed condition
test_cases.python_test_script:
def test_tc_gw_ovr_imm_005_fluctuating_speed(can_bus):
    msgs = collect_warning_messages(can_bus, 4.0)
    assert len(msgs) >= EXPECTED_MIN_MESSAGES
    states = [decode_overspeed_warning(m.data) for m in msgs]
    assert 0 in states and 1 in states

test_cases.title: Verify no redundant immediate transmission when status unchanged
test_cases.precondition: Ignition ON; VehicleSpeed continuously above threshold; Monitor CAN ID 0xD2
test_cases.expected_result: No additional transition events; OverspeedWarning remains 1
